title: croton dongnaiensis
intro: Croton dongnaiensis, also known as Vietnamese croton, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family and is native to Vietnam. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The extracts of Croton dongnaiensis have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing pain and swelling, and preventing infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make infusions or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
